name: Simple Chicken Italiano
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Thin strips of chicken breast
1 package Green Giant American Mixtures California Style Frozen Vegetables (16 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the chicken and about 1/3 of the Italian dressing.
2. Saute until the chicken begins to brown.
3. Add the vegetables and the remaining dressing. Cover; simmer for 7-9 minutes until the vegetables are crisp-tender, stirring frequently. Serve over pasta; sprinkle with cheese.
